From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[UFC](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/UFC "wiktionary:UFC")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[UFC](/wiki/UFC "UFC")** is the Ultimate Fighting Championship, an American mixed martial arts promotion company.

**UFC** may also refer to:

## Organizations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UFC_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Organizations")]

### Academic organizations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UFC_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Academic organizations")]

* [Federal University of Ceará](/wiki/Federal_University_of_Cear%C3%A1 "Federal University of Ceará") (*Universidade Federal do Ceará*), Ceará, Brazil
* [Universities Funding Council](/wiki/Universities_Funding_Council "Universities Funding Council"), a defunct British funding body
* [University of Franche-Comté](/wiki/University_of_Franche-Comt%C3%A9 "University of Franche-Comté") (*Université de Franche-Comté*), Besançon, France

### Businesses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UFC_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Businesses")]

* [UFC Group](/wiki/UFC_Group "UFC Group"), a Mongolian food and beverage company
* [United Fruit Company](/wiki/United_Fruit_Company "United Fruit Company"), an American corporation that traded in bananas and other tropical fruit
* [Universal Foods Corporation (Philippines)](/wiki/Universal_Foods_Corporation_(Philippines) "Universal Foods Corporation (Philippines)") or UFC Philippines, a Philippine food processing company which became a subsidiary of NutriAsia

### Other organizations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UFC_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Other organizations")]

* [Union of Forces for Change](/wiki/Union_of_Forces_for_Change "Union of Forces for Change") (*Union des Forces du Changement*), a Togolese political party
* [United Faculty of Central](/wiki/United_Faculty_of_Central "United Faculty of Central"), an American trade union representing faculty members at Central Washington University in Ellensburg
* [United Farmers of Canada](/wiki/United_Farmers_of_Canada "United Farmers of Canada") (1926–1949), a radical farmers organization
* [United Free Church of Scotland](/wiki/United_Free_Church_of_Scotland "United Free Church of Scotland"), a Scottish Presbyterian denomination
* [Uniting for Consensus](/wiki/Uniting_for_Consensus "Uniting for Consensus") (UfC), a multinational opposition to permanent seats at the UN Security Council
* [UFC-Que Choisir](/wiki/UFC-Que_Choisir "UFC-Que Choisir"), a French consumers group

## Science

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UFC_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Science")]

* [Urea-formaldehyde](/wiki/Urea-formaldehyde "Urea-formaldehyde") concentrate, a thermosetting polymer produced by a Russian chemical company TogliattiAzot
* [Urinary free cortisol](/wiki/Urinary_free_cortisol "Urinary free cortisol"), in medical testing

## Video games

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UFC_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Video games")]

* [*Ultimate Fighting Championship* (video game)](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship_(video_game) "Ultimate Fighting Championship (video game)"), 2000
* *[EA Sports UFC](/wiki/EA_Sports_UFC "EA Sports UFC")*, 2014

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UFC_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [UFC (food brand)](/wiki/UFC_(food_brand) "UFC (food brand)"), a brand of banana ketchup
* [Ulster F.C.](/wiki/Ulster_F.C. "Ulster F.C."), an Irish association football club (1877–1930s)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UFC_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: See also")]
